_desc: First-arrival capture (see RADIO_MODEL.md sec 4.1): alice sends 100ms before bob. Both arrive at hub. Alice has 4dB SNR advantage (>3dB locked threshold). Receiver locks onto alice's preamble before bob arrives, so alice survives via timing-dependent capture.

expect._comment: alice's packet survives via first-arrival capture (4dB > 3dB locked threshold)
